{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321132814D8DC87F871D88DC60C43"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615763174025970457","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"介绍了比较多的太平天国历史，更加生动形象了","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":7,"text":"太平天国","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%AA%E5%B9%B3%E5%A4%A9%E5%9B%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740708948DC60C43%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615763174025970457%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227476006994848009278%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%AA%E5%B9%B3%E5%A4%A9%E5%9B%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773189096,"group_id":"7476006994848009278","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0A9KCXY+z+3L58u0w/iEw8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d2944fb275774442890412d6a8107a4d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616734&x-signature=Sjf1YlOOHvhf8ldBFrYuPfbDKjw%3D","user_id":"54364714667","user_name":"渣男朝阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"54364714667","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476006994848009278","book_info":{"abstract":"本书是一部详尽叙述清朝历史的著作。从清王朝的崛起东北开始，一直叙述到宣统帝逊位，涵盖了清朝近三百年的历史。
将清史划分为八个阶段，从清朝的崛起到建立全国统治，从康雍乾盛世到清中期的衰落，再到晚清的大变局，进行了概要而不失细节的讨论。书中重大史实皆有所本，演绎成章，既保证了史实的可信度，又增加了阅读的趣味性，可谓创历史小说新体。
本书贴紧时代发展脉络，古为今用，用历史智慧为中国现代化过程提供有益的经验和启示。本书是一部内容丰富、结构严谨、具有较高学术价值和启发性的历史著作，适合对清朝历史感兴趣的读者深入阅读和研究。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/542e83e63ca1eca697393dce9303320f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"李沛聪","author_id":"","book_id":"7476006994848009278","book_name":"清史不演义——细说大清三百年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b85848","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"4.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476007026930224152","read_count":"11943","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"743525"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"202","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/542e83e63ca1eca697393dce9303320f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779254894&x-signature=wtEONpCbtgw76O8oma66bel47Z8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"206"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321132814D8DC87F871D88DC60C43"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":93158,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":93306,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":68},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615396589402653464","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"历史总是要借鉴，吸取教训。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773102988,"group_id":"7476006994848009278","s
